scripts.build: pnpm --filter @reviewmark/core build && pnpm --filter reviewmark build && pnpm build:jetbrains-renderer && pnpm --filter @reviewmark/demo build
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @reviewmark/core build && pnpm --filter reviewmark build && pnpm build:jetbrains-renderer
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @reviewmark/core check && pnpm --filter @reviewmark/core build && pnpm --filter reviewmark check && pnpm --filter @reviewmark/demo check
scripts.test: pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter @reviewmark/core test && pnpm --filter reviewmark test
